title: Delicate Crispy Filipino Glace Cherry Lumpia
description: A sweet and crispy Filipino dish featuring glace cherry, perfect for a weeknight dinner, low sodium friendly and cooked in a stone bowl dolsot.
instructions: Preheat the stone bowl dolsot over medium heat.
In a small bowl, mix together the chopped glace cherry and granulated sugar.
Lay a spring roll wrapper on a flat surface and place about 1 tablespoon of the glace cherry mixture in the center of the wrapper.
Brush the edges of the wrapper with a small amount of water.
Fold the bottom half of the wrapper over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the wrapper to form a tight cylinder.
Repeat with the remaining wrappers and filling.
Heat about 1/2 cup of vegetable oil in the preheated stone bowl dolsot over medium heat.
When the oil is hot, add a few of the lumpia to the dolsot and cook until they are golden brown and crispy, about 2-3 minutes on each side.
Remove the lumpia from the oil and place them on a paper towel lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the lumpia hot and enjoy.
